intro1.text1: Nemark understands that behind every brand lies an aspiration to grow. As your strategic partner, we deliver a comprehensive ecosystem of solutions to redraw your growth map in the digital landscape — where every business opportunity is captured and fully realized.
intro1.text2: Nemark is proud to be the trusted partner of over 16,000+ clients throughout a 6-year journey of positioning and elevating brands. With the capability of deploying 860+ Websites/Apps and 500+ stable server systems, Nemark brings peace of mind to businesses — a commitment affirmed by the trust and satisfaction of 98% of our partners.

feedback.title: Partner Feedback
feedback.description: Over 16,000+ clients have trusted and been satisfied with our services

t1.name: Nguyen Van An
t1.content: Nemark helped us build a complete internal management system. The team is professional, dedicated, and always ready to support 24/7. The project was delivered on time with quality beyond expectations.

t2.name: Tran Thi Binh
t2.content: The e-commerce website designed by Nemark helped our revenue increase by 300% in 6 months. Beautiful interface, fast speed, and excellent SEO optimization. Especially impressed with the after-sales service.

t3.name: Le Hoang Nam
t3.content: We have worked with many partners but Nemark understands startup needs the best. They don't just code but also provide close product strategy consulting. Highly recommended!

t4.name: Pham Minh Quan
t4.content: The ERP system deployed by Nemark has completely digitized our production process. Reduced order processing time by 60% and increased management efficiency. A very worthwhile investment!

benefits.title: Why choose Nemark's AI Tools service?

benefits.b1Desc: No international Visa/Mastercard needed. Nemark handles payment, convenient domestic bank transfer.
benefits.b2Desc: Account activated within 15 minutes after payment. Ready to use immediately.
benefits.b3Desc: All subscriptions purchased directly from official providers, guaranteed safe.
benefits.b4Desc: Support team on standby, quickly resolving any account-related issues.
benefits.b5Desc: Providing documentation & video tutorials to maximize premium features.
benefits.b6Desc: Periodic renewal support, special pricing for loyal customers & long-term plans.

process.title: 4 Simple Steps to Get Started
process.subtitle: Quick process, from consultation to activation in just 15 minutes
process.s1Desc: Submit your request via form, Zalo or hotline. Nemark recommends the best plan for your needs.
process.s2Desc: Select the AI tool to upgrade. Pay via bank transfer, Momo, ZaloPay or cash.
process.s3Desc: Nemark purchases the official subscription and activates your account within 15 minutes.
process.s4Desc: Receive detailed user documentation. Support team assists throughout your subscription period.

hero.subtitle: Comprehensive VPS installation, performance optimization & security service. Including Game Server Hosting for Minecraft, Rust, ARK and more.

benefits.title: Comprehensive VPS Setup & Optimization
benefits.subtitle: From basic installation to advanced performance optimization, Nemark handles it all
benefits.b1Desc: Fine-tune NGINX, MySQL, PHP, cache system to make your website/app run 3x faster than default configuration.
benefits.b2Desc: Configure Firewall, Fail2Ban, SSL/TLS, WAF. Block DDoS, brute force & common attacks.
benefits.b3Desc: Legal game server setup: Minecraft, Rust, ARK, CS2, Valheim. JVM optimization, anti-lag, plugin management.
benefits.b4Desc: Daily, weekly, monthly backup system. Multi-location storage ensuring absolute data safety.
benefits.b5Desc: Real-time CPU, RAM, Disk, Network monitoring. Instant alerts via Telegram/Email when anomalies detected.
benefits.b6Desc: Engineering team with 5+ years experience consulting on the best VPS configuration for your needs and budget.

pricing.title: VPS Setup & Optimization Plans
pricing.subtitle: One-time setup fee, including complete installation, optimization and technical support
pricing.basicDesc: VPS installation & optimization for basic website/app, suitable for small businesses.
pricing.proDesc: High performance + advanced security + monitoring, suitable for medium businesses.
pricing.gameDesc: Legal game server setup on VPS: Minecraft, Rust, ARK, CS2, Valheim...
pricing.gameNoteDesc: Nemark only supports setup for games that officially allow hosting: Minecraft (Java & Bedrock), Rust, ARK: Survival Evolved, Counter-Strike 2, Valheim, Terraria, 7 Days to Die, Project Zomboid and more. Contact us for game recommendation.

process.title: Professional Deployment Process
process.subtitle: From assessment to handover, everything is done systematically and transparently
process.s1Desc: Understand VPS usage purpose, expected traffic, tech stack to recommend optimal configuration.
process.s2Desc: Recommend VPS provider, hardware configuration, OS and software suitable for your budget.
process.s3Desc: Install complete stack, optimize performance, configure security, set up monitoring and automatic backup.
process.s4Desc: Deliver detailed documentation, admin guides. Continuous technical support for the committed period.

positions.title: Open Positions
positions.subtitle: Discover positions that match your skills and passion

job1.title: Sales Representative
job1.description: Looking for dynamic sales staff who proactively seek clients, consult on website design, app, and technology solutions for businesses. Unlimited income based on performance.
job1.req1: No experience required, B2B sales experience preferred
job1.req3: Proactive, able to work under KPI pressure
job1.req4: Proficient in social media (Facebook, Zalo, LinkedIn)
job1.req5: Must have personal laptop/phone for work
job1.ben1: Base salary + attractive commission (5-15% contract value)
job1.ben2: Unlimited income, top sales receive hot bonuses
job1.ben3: Free product and sales skills training
job1.ben5: Fast-track to sales team lead position

job2.title: Java Game Developer (NRO / Mobile Game)
job2.description: Hiring Java developers with experience in mobile game development (NRO-style), 2D server-client games. Join us in building, operating and developing features for game projects.
job2.req1: Proficient in Java SE/Java Core, Object-Oriented Programming
job2.req2: Experience or understanding of NRO game structure, 2D mobile games
job2.req3: Knowledge of Socket, multi-threading, character data handling
job2.req4: Experience with MySQL or database management systems
job2.req5: Preferred: Previous mod/dev experience with private servers
job2.ben2: Bonuses based on completed products and features
job2.ben3: Access to real game source code and systems
job2.ben5: Opportunity to develop long-term game projects

job3.title: Fresher / IT Intern
job3.description: Welcoming IT students and fresh graduates who want to learn practically. You'll receive direct training, participate in real projects and develop skills rapidly. Nemark seeks hardworking, eager learners — no need to be skilled already.
job3.req1: Final-year students or fresh graduates in IT, CS or related fields
job3.req2: Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript or Java, PHP (depending on position)
job3.req3: Eager to learn, hardworking, willing to work intensively
job3.req4: Must have personal computer for work
job3.req5: Preferred: Personal projects or freelance experience
job3.ben1: 1-on-1 mentoring, hands-on training with real projects
job3.ben2: Internship allowance + bonuses for good performance
job3.ben3: Opportunity to become full-time employee after 2-3 months
job3.ben5: Build real work experience for your CV

hero.title: ABOUT
hero.subtitle: A young, dedicated, and creative development team — building modern digital solutions for Vietnamese businesses.

introduction.title1: A young and ambitious development team
introduction.p1: Founded in November 2025, NEMARK Dev is a young and ambitious development team, bringing together talented engineers passionate about building reliable, scalable, user-centric web products.
introduction.p2: Though newly established, every team member contributes solid technical skills and a strong spirit of dedication to deliver quality products. We prioritize Clean Architecture, refined UI animations, and performance optimization in every project.
introduction.p3: Animations and interactions are carefully designed to guide users, reduce friction, and enhance the user experience — rather than causing distraction. NEMARK Dev is committed to turning ideas into clean, scalable, high-performance digital products.

vision.title: Vision
vision.p1: Driven by a passion for technology and innovation, NEMARK aims to become a pioneering young team in digital solutions, building reliable, scalable, user-centric web products.
vision.p2: We continuously innovate, create, and build practical solutions with clean architecture and high performance, helping Vietnamese businesses confidently grow sustainably in the digital era.

mission.title: Mission
mission.tagline: Transforming ideas into excellent digital products
mission.content: NEMARK's mission is to break down all technology barriers to unlock the power of the Vietnamese business community. We are committed to bringing specialized technology solutions to millions of customers at optimal costs, building SEO-optimized sustainable website platforms — "digital ambassadors" operating 24/7. NEMARK accompanies businesses in solving all technical challenges, helping businesses focus entirely on core growth goals.

leadership.title: Leadership Team
leadership.subtitle: The talented captains steering the NEMARK ship to the open seas.
leadership.ceoQuote: "Leadership is not a title, it is action and example."

culture.title: Collective Strength - Building Success
culture.subtitle: At NEMARK, every individual is an important piece that creates the overall picture of collective success.

testimonials.subtitle: The Nemark team works professionally, dedicatedly, and delivers technology solutions beyond expectations. We are proud to accompany the success of our partners.
testimonials.partnerCount: Over 200+ businesses have successfully digitally transformed with NEMARK.
testimonials.t1Quote: "Excellent service, enthusiastic support team. Nemark helped us build a professional customer management system, comprehensively enhancing the service experience at AuraVibe."
testimonials.t2Quote: "Your agile workflow truly suits our startup's development speed. The final product was delivered on time with very high code quality."
testimonials.t3Quote: "The multi-channel ordering system deployed by Nemark runs smoothly and handles peak hours well. Our online revenue has grown 30% after 3 months."
testimonials.t4Quote: "The new website interface perfectly captures the brand spirit: refined and luxurious. We've received many compliments from VIP customers about the shopping experience."
